classification_type.Top Secret: Information that could cause exceptionally grave damage to national security if disclosed without authorization.

classification_type.Secret: Information that could cause serious damage to national security if disclosed without authorization.

classification_type.Confidential: Information that could cause damage to national security if disclosed without authorization.

classification_type.Unclassified: Information that does not require protection against unauthorized disclosure. It may still be subject to access restrictions for other reasons.
